title: August 2022 ADP National Employment Report to be Released on Wednesday, August 31, 2022
text: ROSELAND, N.J. , Aug. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  WHAT: ADP Research Institute ® and the Stanford Digital Economy Lab will release the August 2022 non-farm private jobs report and pay data on Wednesday, August 31, 2022 at 8:15 a.m.

title: ADP retools economic indicator to create its own estimate of U.S. job growth
text: The giant payroll firm ADP said Tuesday it has revamped its national employment report to be a stand-alone estimate of the health of the private-sector labor market and will no longer try to forecast the national job data.

title: ADP Research Institute and Stanford Digital Economy Lab Unveil New Methodology for ADP National Employment Report
text: New data series will serve as independent indicator of U.S. workforce and feature high-frequency jobs and pay data; first report available August 31 ROSELAND, N.J. , Aug. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- ADP Research Institute (ADPRI) and the Stanford Digital Economy Lab (the Lab) have developed a new methodology for the ADP National Employment Report (NER) that will provide a more robust, high-frequency view of the labor market with a focus on both jobs and pay.

title: ADP's Intelligent Self-Service Reimagines the HR Service Landscape and Earns "2022 Top HR Product" Honor from Human Resource Executive
text: Data-Driven Solution Anticipates and Solves Employee Payroll, Time, HR and Benefits Challenges, Reducing Time-Intensive Case Management ROSELAND, N.J. , Aug. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Recognized for the eighth consecutive year as an innovative provider of cloud-based human capital management solutions, ADP will be honored with a "Top HR Product" award at the 2022 HR Technology Conference for its new Intelligent Self-Service.
